text:
NCH 

VALUES: 0 = Base record (no enhancements) 
1 = Population Based Payments (PBP) 
2 = Telehealth 
3 = Post Discharge Home Health Visits 
4 = 3-Day SNF Waiver 
5 = Capitation 

COMMENT: This field comes from the CLM-NG-ACO-IND-1-CD–CLM-NG-ACO-IND-5-CD that is present on the first 
claim record included in the stay. If there is no CLM-NG-ACO-IND-1-CD–CLM-NG-ACO-IND-5-CD on the 
first claim, then take the first found code on any of the other claims that make up the stay. 

This field is new in
